# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function adminDashboardReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    if (session_status() !== PHP_SESSION_ACTIVE) {
        @session_start();
    }

    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $startDateRaw = isset($post['start_date']) ? trim((string)$post['start_date']) : '';
    $endDateRaw   = isset($post['end_date']) ? trim((string)$post['end_date']) : '';
    $statusRaw    = isset($post['status']) ? $post['status'] : null;
    $categoryRaw  = isset($post['category']) ? $post['category'] : null;

    $filters = [
        'start_date' => null,
        'end_date' => null,
        'status' => null,
        'category' => null,
    ];

    $errors = [];

    $startDate = null;
    $endDate = null;

    if ($startDateRaw !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $startDateRaw);
        if (!$dt || $dt->format('Y-m-d') !== $startDateRaw) {
            $errors[] = 'Invalid start_date. Expected format: YYYY-MM-DD';
        } else {
            $startDate = $dt->format('Y-m-d');
            $filters['start_date'] = $startDate;
        }
    }

    if ($endDateRaw !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $endDateRaw);
        if (!$dt || $dt->format('Y-m-d') !== $endDateRaw) {
            $errors[] = 'Invalid end_date. Expected format: YYYY-MM-DD';
        } else {
            $endDate = $dt->format('Y-m-d');
            $filters['end_date'] = $endDate;
        }
    }

    if ($startDate !== null && $endDate !== null && $startDate > $endDate) {
        $errors[] = 'start_date cannot be greater than end_date';
    }

    $normalizeList = static function ($v): array {
        if ($v === null) return [];
        if (is_array($v)) $arr = $v;
        else $arr = preg_split('/\s*,\s*/', (string)$v, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
        $out = [];
        foreach ($arr as $item) {
            $item = trim((string)$item);
            if ($item === '' || strtolower($item) === 'all') continue;
            $out[] = $item;
        }
        return array_values(array_unique($out));
    };

    $statuses = $normalizeList($statusRaw);
    $categories = $normalizeList($categoryRaw);

    if ($statuses) $filters['status'] = $statuses;
    if ($categories) $filters['category'] = $categories;

    $table = 'orders';
    $createdCol = 'created_at';
    $statusCol = 'status';
    $categoryCol = 'category_id';

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if ($startDate !== null) {
        $where[] = "$table.$createdCol >= :start_dt";
        $params[':start_dt'] = $startDate . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    if ($endDate !== null) {
        $where[] = "$table.$createdCol <= :end_dt";
        $params[':end_dt'] = $endDate . ' 23:59:59';
    }

    $makeInClause = static function (array $values, string $prefix, array &$params): string {
        $ph = [];
        foreach (array_values($values) as $i => $val) {
            $k = ':' . $prefix . $i;
            $ph[] = $k;
            $params[$k] = $val;
        }
        return '(' . implode(',', $ph) . ')';
    };

    if (!empty($statuses)) {
        $in = $makeInClause($statuses, 'st_', $params);
        $where[] = "$table.$statusCol IN $in";
    }

    if (!empty($categories)) {
        $in = $makeInClause($categories, 'cat_', $params);
        $where[] = "$table.$categoryCol IN $in";
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ('WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where)) : '';

    $sqlSummary = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
            COALESCE(SUM($table.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
            COALESCE(AVG($table.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN $table.$statusCol = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paid_orders,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN $table.$statusCol = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_orders,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN $table.$statusCol = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelled_orders
        FROM $table
        $whereSql
    ";

    $sqlByStatus = "
        SELECT
            $table.$statusCol AS status,
            COUNT(*) AS orders,
            COALESCE(SUM($table.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
        FROM $table
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY $table.$statusCol
        ORDER BY orders DESC
    ";

    $sqlByCategory = "
        SELECT
            $table.$categoryCol AS category_id,
            COUNT(*) AS orders,
            COALESCE(SUM($table.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
        FROM $table
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY $table.$categoryCol
        ORDER BY orders DESC
    ";

    $sqlByDay = "
        SELECT
            DATE($table.$createdCol) AS day,
            COUNT(*) AS orders,
            COALESCE(SUM($table.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
        FROM $table
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY DATE($table.$createdCol)
        ORDER BY day ASC
    ";

    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

    $run = static function (PDO $pdo, string $sql, array $params, bool $singleRow = false) {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
            $stmt->bindValue($k, $v, is_int($v) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        return $singleRow ? ($stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: []) : $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    };

    $summary = $run($pdo, $sqlSummary, $params, true);
    $byStatus = $run($pdo, $sqlByStatus, $params, false);
    $byCategory = $run($pdo, $sqlByCategory, $params, false);
    $byDay = $run($pdo, $sqlByDay, $params, false);

    return [
        'ok' => empty($errors),
        'errors' => $errors,
        'filters_applied' => $filters,
        'queries' => [
            'summary' => $sqlSummary,
            'by_status' => $sqlByStatus,
            'by_category' => $sqlByCategory,
            'by_day' => $sqlByDay,
        ],
        'params' => $params,
        'data' => [
            'summary' => $summary,
            'by_status' => $byStatus,
            'by_category' => $byCategory,
            'by_day' => $byDay,
        ],
    ];
}
